title: Buttery Silky Light Venezuelan Wild Mushrooms Stir-fry
description: This buttery and silky dish features wild mushrooms that are caramelized for a touch of sweetness in a light Venezuelan-inspired meal.
instructions: Season wild mushrooms with unprocessed salt.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced mushrooms and garlic. Sauté for about 5 minutes or until mushrooms begin to release their moisture.
Add red bell pepper strips and cook for another minute until peppers are slightly softened.
Toss the mixture with paprika and unsalted butter. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Pour in heavy cream. Reduce heat to medium-low and let simmer gently until sauce thickens slightly, about 5 more minutes.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
